name: Iscas (Lisbon Liver)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a marinade with the wine, vinegar, garlic, bay leaf, and seasoning.
2. Pour the marinade over the liver and cover. Leave for 24 hours.
3. Remove the liver from the marinade and pat dry. Reserve the marinade.
4. Heat enough oil in a frying pan to cover the bottom of the pan.
5. Add the liver and bacon to the pan. Cook until tender, turning once.
6. Remove the meat and keep warm. Add the reserved marinade to the pan, removing the bay leaf.
7. Reduce quickly. Pour the sauce over the meat and serve with fried sliced potatoes.
